backstory.original: It was only when Valindra Shadowmantle's undead horde was clawing at her door that the god Selûne came to Celeste. A wave of divine energy burst out from Celeste, annihilating the skeletons and zombies, leaving her unconscious. When she came to, she understood. She needed to assemble those who were dedicated to fighting evil and serve her god and her people.
backstory.display: 当瓦琳德拉·暗影斗篷的亡灵部落在她的门前张牙舞爪时，塞伦涅降临到西莱丝特身上。一股神圣的能量从西莱丝特身上迸发出来，消灭了骷髅和僵尸，也使她失去知觉。当她醒来后，她明白了。她要召集那些致力于打击邪恶的人，为她的神和人民服务。

description.original: A flash of light streaks towards the closest enemy.
description.display: 发出一发闪光飞弹攻击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Celeste calls forth a pillar of flame centered on a random enemy.
description.display: 西莱丝特以一名随机敌人为中心召唤一道火柱。

longDescription.original: Celeste prays for the power of Selûne to call forth a pillar of flame on a random enemy, burning all nearby enemies as well. Simultaneously, a pillar of light heals living party members to full health.
longDescription.display: 西莱丝特引导塞伦涅的力量，对一名随机敌人召唤出一道火柱，烧伤该敌人及附近所有敌人。同时还会召唤一道光柱，为所有存活的队伍成员恢复全部生命值。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions next to $source by $(amount)%
与$source相邻的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害

tipText.original: Celeste increases the damage of adjacent Champions. Place her next to your most damaging Champions.
tipText.display: 西莱丝特使相邻勇士的伤害提高。将她放置在杀伤力最强的勇士身边。

description.desc: Heals Champions in the column in front of $source for $(amount) every second
处于$source前列的勇士每秒回复 $(amount) 生命值

tipText.original: Celeste heals everyone in the column in front of her. Place her behind your front-most Champions to keep them alive longer.
tipText.display: 西莱丝特治疗纵队前方的所有人。将她放置在前线勇士的后方，从而延长他们的生命。

specializationDescription.original: Celeste focuses her concentration on increasing the damage of those around her.
specializationDescription.display: 西莱丝特专注于提高周围勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Increases the range of $(upgrade_name id) by 1 (affects all Champions in both of the 2 columns ahead of Celeste)
$(upgrade_name id)的范围提升 1 格（对西莱丝特前方 2 列的所有勇士生效）

specializationDescription.original: Celeste focuses her concentration on healing those in need of aid who are a bit further from her .
specializationDescription.display: 西莱丝特专注于治疗离她略远，但急需帮助的盟友。

description.original: The party only succeeds if we all pull our weight.
description.display: 所有人齐心协力，队伍才能走向胜利。

description.original: For Faerûn! For Selûne! For all living creatures!
description.display: 为了费伦！为了塞伦涅！为了所有的生命！

description.original: I am a conduit for Selûne's will.
description.display: 我是塞伦涅意志的传递者。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Celeste's healing ability by $amount%
Increases the effect of Celeste's healing ability by $amount%

description.original: Children are our most precious resource.
description.display: 孩子们是我们最宝贵的资源。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Celeste's healing ability by $amount%

description.original: I'm the most durable cleric there is!
We are the divine shield against evil!
description.display: 我们是对抗邪恶的神圣之盾！

description.original: How can you sharpen something that is already sharp?
description.display: 你要怎么磨砺已经很锐利的东西呢？

description.original: Keep pushing forward, I've got your back.
Burn in the light of the moon maiden!
description.display: 在月亮少女的光辉中燃烧吧！

description.original: Selûne's power is nothing - Shar's perfection eclipses it
description.display: 塞伦涅的力量微不足道——莎尔的完美让它黯然失色

name.display: 托瑞尔治疗师西莱丝特

character_sheet_details.backstory: It was only when Valindra Shadowmantle's undead horde was clawing at her door that the god Selûne came to Celeste. A wave of divine energy burst out from Celeste, annihilating the skeletons and zombies, leaving her unconscious. When she came to, she understood. She needed to assemble those who were dedicated to fighting evil and serve her god and her people.
